DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT DEIRDRE FAHERTY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS MOTION IS GRANTED, AND SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO THE MOVING PARTY IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,215, WHICH OMITS THE ESTIMATED FEES FOR REPLYING TO AN OPPOSITION (NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED). Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S To Respond To Deft'S Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DEIRDRE FAHERTY's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's To Respond To Defendant'S Interrogatories And Request For Production And Request For Sanctions Motion is granted, and sanctions are awarded to the moving party in the amount of $1,215, which omits the estimated fees for replying to an opposition (no opposition was filed). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/JPT)
